name: Cantonese Egg Foo Yung Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the cornstarch in 1/2 cup cold water and stir well.
2. Gradually add the cornstarch mixture to boiling water, stirring constantly.
3. Reduce heat to medium and add the remaining ingredients.
4. Cook for an additional 3 minutes, then serve with Egg Foo Yung or stir-fried vegetables.
